message:

+      {
+        "title": "Check current surrealdb setup",
+        "description": "Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:\n```bash\nsurreal version\n```\nThis feature requires a working surrealdb installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review surrealdb configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nIn an application I am currently planning, I have a need to store files and in some cases whole directories with a wide variety of sizes (approx 1kB-1GB) together with structured data."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Support for storing large binary data / files",
+        "description": "Thank you for submitting this pull request. We really appreciate you spending the time to work on SurrealDB. 🚀 🎉 \n\n## What is the motivation?\n\nSee #1652. Files are a big part of data, and it's something we'd like to offer with a certain capacity in SurrealDB. This PR aims to be a first start in building an ecosystem of tools around files, whilst also building the foundation of features to come in the future.\n\n## What does this change do?\n\nThis PR adds a couple new features and changes\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade surrealdb to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade surrealdb:\n```bash\n# Check current version\nsurreal version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/surrealdb/surrealdb\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",

+      }
